parameters.sqlQuery: SELECT provider, refresh_token, client_id, client_secret FROM `campwill-ec.raw.oauth_tokens` WHERE provider = 'microsoft_ads' LIMIT 1

parameters.errorMessage: Microsoft Ads OAuth refresh failed. Check raw.oauth_tokens.last_error and raw.oauth_tokens_history. Probably refresh_token revoked - run bootstrap again.
